topic_summary: Heat-affected zone liquation cracking and strain-age cracking in nickel-based superalloys; mechanisms (segregation and constitutional liquation), prevention strategies (grain size control, low impurities, restraint reduction, buttering), and strain-age cracking in precipitation-strengthened alloys with alloy 718 as the resistant case.
